nasb.text: let them bring a royal robe which the king has worn, and the horse on which the king has ridden, and on whose head a royal crown has been placed;

esv.text: let royal robes be brought, which the king has worn, and the horse that the king has ridden, and on whose head a royal crown is set.

cnv.text: 要把王常穿的朝服和王常騎的駿馬，就是頭戴王冠的駿馬帶來，

ccb.text: 可以拿来王穿过的袍子，牵来王骑过的戴冠的御马，
